{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Crawling Shades
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Crawling Shades]] turns a shadow into a symbiotic [[Remnant]] of darkness that devours enemy techniques.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
